title: Pigzilla
description: This mod adds pigzilla, the gigantic version of the pig.
body:
Mod showcase:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DLodpoqAEus" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This mod adds the pigzilla, giant pig that attacks everything, and the biting pig which can evolve into the pigzilla after killing several mobs.

Pigzilla has two attacks: stomp, tusk attack

Stomp attack makes shockwaves around the pigzilla and also makes a quake that damages all mobs in the radius and throws them into the sky.
Tusk attack makes the mobs thrown into the air, and before stomping the ground it will bite mobs in the sky, giving additional damage. After stomping, it will also make shockwaves and quake same as stomp attack.


Biting pig is a mob that looks the same as usual pigs, but they will eat every living thing with its strong jaw. After feasting several mobs, it will evolve into the pigzilla. So make sure to find those suspicious pigs and kill them before it's too late!
